gaps.description: The content pool contains zero quantitative or measurable performance data regarding fabric function (e.g., breathability ratings, tensile strength). The discussion remains purely descriptive and qualitative.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Leistungswerte der Funktionsstoffe", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: There is no mention or reference to industry-standard technical metrics like hydrostatic head (Wassersäule) or Mean Vapor Transmission Rate. These measurements are entirely absent.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Wassersäule und MVTR", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: None of the fragments address fabric durability using industry-standard quantitative abrasion tests such as Martindale cycles. Durability is only discussed vaguely.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Martindale Scheuertouren", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: While some fragments mention 'recycled materials' (frag_083) and sustainability, they do not explain how a technical closed-loop system is implemented or maintained for the user. The focus remains on fashion ethics rather than industrial process.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Geschlossenes Kreislaufsystem", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: Several fragments offer general 'Care Guides' for stain removal and textile maintenance (frag_118, frag_112). However, they do not provide information about a structured commercial or professional Repair Service mechanism.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Reparaturservice", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: The concept of sustainability and material origin is covered (e.g., frag_083), but there is no explicit, actionable policy or mechanism detailing the return, retrieval, or take-back process for the product at the end of its lifecycle.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Produktlebenszyklus-Rücknahme", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: No top match applies the `technical-precision` brand guideline required by the brief. Some candidates exist but lacked any required brand guideline and were filtered out.
gaps.suggestedAction: Add fragments tagged `technical-precision` (alongside sustainability-voice) for the de-de corpus so this brand voice is represented in the top matches.

sections.heading: Messbare Leistungswerte und Schutzfunktionen
sections.rationale: Handwerker und Außendienstmitarbeiter benötigen quantitative Daten zu Stofffunktion (z.B. Atmungsaktivität, Wassersäule) für Kaufentscheidungen.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Leistungswerte der Funktionsstoffe" und "Wassersäule und MVTR", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

sections.heading: Extreme Haltbarkeit nach Industriestandards
sections.rationale: Der Text muss über allgemeine Beschreibung hinausgehend quantitative Angaben zur Abriebfestigkeit liefern, die für den professionellen Einsatz relevant sind.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Martindale Scheuertouren", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

sections.heading: Vom Produkt zur geschlossenen Kreislaufwirtschaft
sections.rationale: Es muss ein industrieller Prozess beschrieben werden, der die Rücknahme und den Umgang mit Materialien am Ende des Lebenszyklus definiert.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Geschlossenes Kreislaufsystem" sowie "Produktlebenszyklus-Rücknahme", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

sections.heading: Professioneller Reparaturservice und Wartung
sections.rationale: Die Information muss über allgemeine Pflegehinweise hinausgehen und einen strukturierten, kommerziellen Reparaturdienst nachweisen.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word de-de product-story fragment covering "Reparaturservice", applying technical-precision and sustainability-voice.
